message:
test(ufunc,linalg,random,io): expand coverage for NaN/Inf edge cases, batch ops, polynomial families, and misc ufuncs

- fnp-ufunc: fix logaddexp/logaddexp2 NaN propagation (early-return before f64::max skips NaN), add hermesub/poly2herme exports, add tests for maximum NaN propagation, minimum signed-zero, financial zero-rate/timing/degenerate branches, Chebyshev/Hermite/Laguerre polynomial edge cases, busday/bitwise_count/gcd/divmod/histogram2d/convolve2d/block/vecdot/packbits; 1,652 → 1,756 tests
- fnp-linalg: add batch_det (singular matrix), batch_inv (identity), batch_trace, and shape-mismatch error tests; 217 → 230 tests
- fnp-random: add permuted (1D/2D/axis/deterministic) coverage; 191 → 196 tests
- fnp-io: use split_whitespace for space-delimiter in genfromtxt to correctly handle consecutive spaces; 174 → 176 tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
